things.name: Cascade Complex
things.description: Giant stairway of fountains and gardens leading to the Cafesjian Museum with international sculpture

things.name: Republic Square
things.description: Pink tuff-stone government buildings surrounding Armenia's central square with dancing fountains

things.name: Tsitsernakaberd Armenian Genocide Memorial
things.description: Solemn memorial to the 1.5 million Armenians killed in the 1915 genocide

things.name: Geghard Monastery
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval monastery carved partly into a cliff in a dramatic gorge

things.name: Garni Temple
things.description: 1st-century Hellenistic pagan temple - the only surviving Greco-Roman colonnade in the former USSR

things.name: Khor Virap Monastery
things.description: Monastery at the foot of Mount Ararat with the dungeon where Gregory the Illuminator was imprisoned

things.name: Vernissage Market
things.description: Weekend outdoor market with hand-painted carpets, chess sets, Soviet memorabilia and folk art

things.name: Yerevan Brandy Company (Ararat)
things.description: Tour and tasting of Armenia's world-famous Ararat brandy, Churchill's favourite

things.name: History Museum of Armenia
things.description: 6,000 years of Armenian history with a famous collection of Bronze Age and Urartian artefacts

things.name: Noravank Monastery Canyon
things.description: Red-cliffed canyon with the 13th-century double-storey church of Surb Astvatsatsin
